name: Adjust element transparency - Canva Help Center
snippet: On the editor toolbar, select the Transparency icon, and drag the slider to adjust. slide and tap on Transparency. Tap and drag the slider to adjust.

name: how to make one of the layers semi transparent? : r/pixlr - Reddit
snippet: On the right hand side in the layers tab, if you click on a layer there should be an opacity slider. Hope this helps!
